title: calycomelia richardii
intro: Calycomelia richardii, also known as the Mexican calycomelia, is a flowering plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Calycomelia richardii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce the risk of infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
